title: Sudi Kan Wo De Yanshen Zhujian Bianzhi
titleRomaji: Sudi Kan Wo De Yanshen Zhujian Bianzhi
titleNative: 宿敌看我的眼神逐渐变质
synopsis: In Yu Wan's eyes, Ni Shang is a bitch who has been her arch-nemesis since childhood. The only reason she accepted an internship at Ni Shang's company was because her father threatened to force her to give up her dreams of becoming a dancer. Trying to annoy Ni Shang in any way she can, Yu Wan claimed she was a lesbian to scare her away. But why is Ni Shang looking at me so strangely all of a sudden? And why is her hands all over me? (Source: Bilibili, translated) Note: Chapter count includes 5 extras.

title: Yueguo Chenshi de Ge
titleNative: 越过尘世的歌
synonyms: The Song That Transcends This World
synopsis: During troubled times, Weng Shaoying is one of the most famous singers in Dongping. Many people go to Song of Fairyland just to see her perform. However, under her glamorous facade, she has been controlled for more than 10 years. On the other side of Dongping is Bi Xing Tang, one of the most famous gangs there. After her father’s death, Yanchu became the young female leader of Bi Xing Tang, which caused a lot of rumors to spread. On one inevitably fortuitous night, the two happened to meet. At that time, neither of them knew that they would eventually become the most important person in the other’s life. Starting from that night onwards, the gears in Shaoying and Yanchu’s fate will forever be rotating together. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Akuyaku Onzoushi no Kanchigai Seija Seikatsu: Nidome no Jinsei wa Yaritai Houdaishitai Dake na Noni
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Onzoushi no Kanchigai Seija Seikatsu: Nidome no Jinsei wa Yaritai Houdaishitai Dake na Noni
titleNative: 悪役御曹司の勘違い聖者生活 ～二度目の人生はやりたい放題したいだけなのに～
synonyms: The Mistaken Saintly Life of a Villainous Scion ~ I Just Want to Do Whatever I Want for the Second Time in My Life!
synopsis: Ogre Verret, the eldest son of the Verret family, a family renowned for its viciousness, is a reincarnator. He was always getting cheated in his previous life because of his kind nature, and he wants to take this opportunity to enjoy the life of a powerful villain who can do whatever he wants. He is supposed be pushing the limits of tyranny, but... "Well done! Ogre-sama!" Even though he is behaving in an "insolent manner,'' for some reason those around him seem to be taking it in stride...⁉ The misunderstood villain's life as a saint begins! (Source: Dengeki Comic Regulus, translated)

titleNative: 听星

title: Isekai demo Bunan ni Ikitai Shoukougun
titleRomaji: Isekai demo Bunan ni Ikitai Shoukougun
titleNative: 異世界でも無難に生きたい症候群
synonyms: ขอให้อยู่รอดปลอดภัยในต่างโลก
It's Sudden, But I Came To Another World! But I Hope To Live Safely
synopsis: "Understanding" is "Stronger" than a Sword! There is no magic without any weapons! But! This is the story of a man who wishes to live safely! "So, I've come to a different world." That man stood alone in a mountain full of plants and creatures that he never knew nor saw before. He goes down the mountain by avoiding encounters with a big slime (and bandits), and is caught as a suspicious person in the castle he reaches. In interrogation the female knight Ilius met at the imprisoned place, when talking about the bandits seen in the mountain, Irias, who was stuck in the search for said bandits, hurriedly strikes the bandits . My wish to be a brave man, or to build a harem? "I just want to live in a safe place" - a story that such a man survives the different world with "Understanding" as a weapon!

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
synonyms: Put it all in the Ring

title: You Shou Yan
titleNative: 有兽焉
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleRomaji: Boroboro no Elf-san wo Shiawase ni Suru Kusuriuri-san
titleEnglish: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleNative: ボロボロのエルフさんを幸せにする薬売りさん
synopsis: An apothecary lives a quiet life selling potions and medicine in a country village, until one day he’s approached with a devil’s bargain. A pawnbroker offers him the perfect ingredient for crafting legendary medicine—but the “ingredient” turns out to be a mortally wounded elf! Legend has it the flesh and bones of elves can be ground up into a true panacea, and this elven maiden is on the brink of death after being ruthlessly tortured by slavers. Filled with rage, the apothecary vows to nurse her back to health and happiness, no matter what it takes. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Jigoku de Mesu ga Hikaru
titleNative: 地獄でメスがひかる
synopsis: Hiromi is mistreated by her family because of her naturally ugly appearance. Unable to bear her situation, she attempts to commit suicide, but is rescued in the nick of time by a genius doctor, Iwao Toshiaki, and is exposed to human kindness for the first time. However, Iwao is trying to use Hiromi's brain to enter the realm of the divine, which is inaccessible to humans... (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 雨夜の月
synopsis: One day, while rushing to a piano lesson, a girl named Saki collides with someone on the street. As Saki collects herself, the stranger picks up the sheet music Saki dropped, hands it to Saki together with a band-aid, and continues on her way—all without sayin
searchTerms: The Moon on a Rainy Night

title: Urushi Uruhashi
titleNative: うるしうるはし
synopsis: Mihiro Kanayama is a third-year high school student who aspires to become a lacquerware craftsman. He is given a challenge by his grandfather, who tells him to "create a piece while thinking about the person who would use it." He didn't know how to go about it, until he meets Tsumugi Fukaya, a woman working at an inn. Pure emotions bloom within a young man dedicated to traditional craftsmanship. Though he may be clumsy in his first attempts, you will come to admire his determined perseverance! (Source: Manga Cross, translated)

synopsis: Through posting a "Best Comment", I somehow became the main character of a webtoon! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleRomaji: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleNative: 屍王の帰還　～元勇者の俺、自分が組織した厨二秘密結社を止めるために再び異世界に召喚されてしまう～
synonyms: The Return of the Corpse King
synopsis: "How can my past self get so excited doing all those embarrassing things!?" When he was in the third year of middle school, Hizaki Shiou was summoned to another world to save it. After defeating the Demon King, he was forcibly returned back to the present day. Yet another three years later, he is summoned to the other world once again, this time to stop the rampage of the secret society "Helheim." That organization was supposedly actually the one that he had founded during his chuunibyou phase, where he called himself the "Corpse King"—a dark past too embarrassing to remember! Someone seems to be impersonating the name of "Helheim" and tarnishing its reputation. To uncover the truth behind this mystery and clear the organization's name, the Corpse King reunites with his former subordinates, the "Hakkai," who once made Helheim the strongest it had ever been. While agonizing over his dark past, he begins to take action in the other world once again. Their first stop is the Steel City of Gagiul—rescue the city struggling through famine as well as the pale-looking count's daughter in distress. "Helheim, moving out. (Source: Comic-Walker, translated)

title: Aruiwa, Watashi no Meitantei
titleNative: 或いは、私の名探偵
synopsis: High schooler Odagiri Momo leaves her home island to attend high school on the mainland. Having grown up on a boring island, Momo dreams of becoming a detective and is always on the lookout for cases. After moving into her first apartment, she meets the mysterious beauty Akaishi Kotone and falls for her at first sight. Declaring she'll make the reluctant Kotone her “assistant” against her will, the two form a buddy team to solve small everyday mysteries together. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Oshi ga Wagaya ni Yattekita!
titleNative: 推しが我が家にやってきた！
synonyms: My Idol Came To My House!
synopsis: "Please go out with me, with the intent of eventual marriage!" How will Sumire handle the unexpected proposal from her favorite actor Saki-kun? "I love you, but I'm just a fan. You can't be serious!?" As she spends time with Saki-kun every day, can Sumire avoid breaking the boundary between between idol and fan? It's a love comedy about a fan being pursued by her idol! (Source: Flex Comics, translated)

title: Yamato wa Koi no Mahoroba
titleNative: やまとは恋のまほろば
synonyms: Yamato is a Splendid Place for Love
synopsis: College student Sanwa Honoka is ridiculed by male students for her plump figure. As her best friend gets the most out of college life, her only solace is the Ancient Tomb Study Group, where she can talk about her favorite things, surrounded by two laid-back male members. However, Honoka considers member Iida as a lover at a certain moment. A poetic psychological depiction of how a girl with low self-esteem finds spiritual support and matures. (Source: Japan Media Arts Festival) Note: - A Jury Selection award winner in the Manga Section of the 23rd Japan Media Arts Festival. - Originally published on LINE Manga until it was cancelled on 2020-10-11. The serialization moved to Bunshun Online and new chapters published starting 2022-06-20.
